market_overview.headline: Market structure showing divergence with SPY pullback to 21W while QQQ holds unstacked bullish, but BTC full bear structure suggests risk-off undertones.
market_overview.detail: 37% of top 300 stocks remain Full Bull, but 26% are Full Bear with both SPY and QQQ showing crossover risks. Finance sector deep in bear territory (-14% net score) while Energy and Non-energy minerals lead at 100% bullish.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Setups - Crossover Alerts Active

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Tech and Memory Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology names dominate momentum leaders with memory and storage companies showing exceptional acceleration. SNDK leads with 31% spread score, followed by memory plays WDC and MU.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy and Materials vs Tech Services Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish alignment with 13.2% average gains above 21W.
Mining and metals showing complete bullish structure across all names.
Infrastructure and industrial support services leading with unanimous bullish signals.

weakest.note: Massive tech rotation with 90% of names in bearish structure.
Complete bearish structure across commercial service providers.
Financial sector split but leaning bearish with over half in bear structure.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into cyclical materials and energy. Electronic technology holding up better than software, suggesting hardware over software preference.

items.text: SPY and QQQ both showing bearish crossover risks with tight EMA compression
BTC full bear structure at -45% from fair value could signal broader risk-off environment
Technology services sector showing 90% bearish structure with major names like MSFT, ORCL deep underwater
21 names showing Bull Breakdown signals indicating uptrend deterioration accelerating
